en.name: Panzer Arms BP12 12ga Shotgun
en.description: BP12 is part of Panzer Arms Precision Tactical series. Its features are unique and designed specifically for the bullpup platform, rather than just using standard features adapted from full-length firearms.

en.name: Panzer Arms BP12 12ga Shotgun Receiver
en.description: The receiver of the Panzer Arms BP12 12ga Shotgun, designed for optimal performance and reliability.

en.name: Panzer Arms BP12 5-round 12/70 magazine
en.description: A 5-round 12/70 magazine for the Panzer Arms BP12 12ga Shotgun.

en.name: Panzer Arms BP12 12-round 12/70 magazine
en.description: A 12-round 12/70 magazine for the Panzer Arms BP12 12ga Shotgun.

en.name: BP12 16 inch Barrel
en.description: A 16 inch (406 mm) barrel for the BP12 12ga Shotgun.

en.name: BP12 12 inch Barrel
en.description: A 12 inch (305 mm) barrel for the BP12 12ga Shotgun.
